page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz with 1 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 (AVX512F and AVX512_VNNI) and cryptographic acceleration via AES, VAES, and SHA_NI.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.g7.16xlarge demonstrates strong multi-core performance, as evidenced by its high scores in multi-threaded stress-ng and Geekbench multi-core tests. It excels in parallelized workloads, such as software compilation with Clang, ray tracing, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, all of which rank in the top 25% tier. Single-core performance remains average, matching standard expectations for its 2.7 GHz clock speed. Memory performance is robust, with strong PassMark memory and database operation scores, alongside average memory bandwidth read and write speeds. The instance also exhibits strong static web serving throughput and efficient prompt processing and text generation for smaller language models, though performance scales down to average levels for medium-sized 7B models.

As a general-purpose instance with dedicated CPU resources, the ecs.g7.16xlarge offers a balanced resource profile suitable for enterprise-grade workloads. The absence of bundled local storage means storage costs are decoupled, allowing users to scale network storage independently. Given its strong multi-core processing capabilities and high network bandwidth, this instance is suitable for multi-threaded applications, database operations, static web serving, software build pipelines, and moderate machine learning inference tasks that do not require GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose, x86_64-based server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators but provides a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core capabilities, with top-tier performance in multi-threaded decompression, software compilation, ray tracing, and database operations. Single-core performance and memory bandwidth remain average. With its dedicated CPU allocation and robust multi-threaded throughput, the ecs.g7.16xlarge is suitable for enterprise databases, static web serving, software build pipelines, and small-to-medium scale machine learning inference workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose server with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core general-purpose instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and balanced memory for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores at 2.7 GHz
Equipped with 256 GB of RAM (4.0 GB per core) and no local storage
Features 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
Delivers strong multi-core performance in compilation, ray tracing, and database operations
Suitable for enterprise databases, web serving, and multi-threaded build pipelines
